findings.note: The Claude .js twin is exercised with the payload passed via the PAYLOAD env var, but Claude Code delivers PreToolUse payloads on stdin; the .js twin's stdin input branch is not directly tested for the Bash write case. Mitigated because the sh-dispatcher->.py path (stdin) is tested in section (c) and denies identically, so the stdin decision path is covered cross-runtime. Non-blocking.
